input.testCaseTitle: Login from Product head,approve/reject options are not be visible.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-194 reported defect: Login from Product head,approve/reject options are not be visible.
input.errorMessage: Login from Product head,approve/reject options are not be visible.

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Product Head did not see the expected approve/reject actions after login. The role-specific workflow actions were corrected and verified on the development server.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.78. ui-regression is acceptable because the visible symptom is missing buttons; source detail is thin.
